title: A New Song

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In the depths of darkness I waited
Patient through the longest night
Until Your hand reached down and saved me
Lifted me into the light

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: From the pit of mud and mire
To solid ground beneath my feet
Now a new song fills my spirit
And my heart has found its beat

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You've given me a song to sing
A testimony of Your grace
My lips will tell Your wondrous deeds
Until I see Your face
Your love has made me whole again
Your mercy sets me free
I'll sing Your praise with every breath
For all eternity

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: More than offerings and sacrifices
You desire a faithful heart
Write Your truth upon my spirit
Let Your love never depart

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Though troubles surround me
Your presence sustains
Your faithfulness guides me
Your promise remains

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You've given me a song to sing
A testimony of Your grace
My lips will tell Your wondrous deeds
Until I see Your face
Your love has made me whole again
Your mercy sets me free
I'll sing Your praise with every breath
For all eternity
Poor and needy, still You seek me
Your thoughts toward me cannot cease
In Your timing, in Your wisdom
You will bring me perfect peace

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You've given me a song to sing
A testimony of Your grace
My lips will tell Your wondrous deeds
Until I see Your face
Your love has made me whole again
Your mercy sets me free
I'll sing Your praise with every breath
For all eternity

epigraph: And he hath put a new song in my mouth
